prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次依次约1480→1319→2373→3003→3881名，整体呈持续后移趋势，近3年累计后移约2500名；2025年基准位次约3881名；该校在广东物理类招生计划2021–2023年均为23人，2024年增至24人，2025年增至26人；2026年计划大幅扩招至37人，较2025年增加11人（增幅约42.3%），显著缓解竞争 压力，推动位次数字增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉:
浙江大学医学院隶属于浙江大学（985/211/双一流），软科2026年主榜排名第3，属全国顶尖高校层次，对高分考生吸引力极强。
4 .【声誉热度】2026年声誉评价偏负面，涉及学术不端与师德师风事件，可能轻微抑制报考热度；但抖音综合热度排名第14（高热），短视频曝光量大，整体关注度仍处高位；近 年未见明显投档断档记录；临床医学（A）、基础医学（A-）、药学（A+）等均为全国顶尖水平，与招生专业高度匹配，对医学方向考生有强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 浙江大学医学院位于浙江杭州，属长三角核心城市，地域吸引力强；广东省考生对省外顶尖医学院校报考意愿 较高，跨省竞争持续；临床医学、口腔医学近年持续高热推荐，药学热度偏热，医学类专业整体报考意愿旺盛；广东省2026年物理类考生约45.6万人，较2025年增加约1.6万人（+3.6%） ，竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年大幅扩招（42.3%）与广东物理类考生小幅增加（3.6%）、医学专业持续高热、声誉偏负面等因素，扩招效应占主导，预计202 6年最低位次在2025年3881名基础上继续后移；预测最低位次约4786名，区间4286–5286名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（5+3一体化）
- 口腔医学（5+3一体化）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 医学试验班类（含临床医学、口腔医学）
- 临床医学（儿科方向，5+3一体化）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 药学类（含药学专业）
- 预防医学。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间4286–5286名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（4286名以内）可重点冲击临床医学和口腔医学等王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（5286名附近）应以三档专业为主确保录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 1480 → 1319 → 2373 → 3003 → 3881, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2500 positions in the last 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 3881; the enrollment plan for this university in Guangdong Physics Category was 23 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 24 in 2024, and to 26 in 2025; the 2026 plan significantly expands to 37 students, an increase of 11 students (approximately 42.3%) compared to 2025, significantly easing competition pressure and pushing the ranking number larger.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text:
Zhejiang University School of Medicine is affiliated with Zhejiang University (985/211/Double First-Class), ranked 3rd in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, belonging to the top tier of national universities, with strong appeal to high-scoring candidates.
4. [Reputation Heat] The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving academic misconduct and teacher ethics incidents, which may slightly suppress application enthusiasm; but the comprehensive Douyin heat ranking is 14th (high heat), with high short video exposure, overall attention remains high; no obvious admission gaps in recent years; Clinical Medicine (A), Basic Medicine (A-), Pharmacy (A+) are all at the national top level, highly matching the enrollment majors, with strong appeal to medical-oriented candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Zhejiang University School of Medicine is located in Hangzhou, Zhejiang, a core city in the Yangtze River Delta, with strong regional appeal; candidates from Guangdong have a high willingness to apply to top medical schools outside the province, with sustained cross-provincial competition; Clinical Medicine and Stomatology have been highly recommended in recent years, Pharmacy is moderately hot, and medical majors overall have strong application demand; the number of Physics Category candidates in Guangdong in 2026 is about 456,000, an increase of about 16,000 (+3.6%) compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant expansion in 2026 (42.3%), a slight increase in Guangdong Physics Category candidates (3.6%), sustained high heat for medical majors, and somewhat negative reputation, the expansion effect dominates; it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will continue to shift backward from the 2025 ranking of 3881; the predicted minimum ranking is about 4786, with a range of 4286–5286.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program)
- Stomatology (5+3 Integrated Program)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Medical Experimental Class (including Clinical Medicine, Stomatology)
- Clinical Medicine (Pediatrics Direction, 5+3 Integrated Program)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Pharmacy (including Pharmacy major)
- Preventive Medicine
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 4286–5286, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 majors as a reach, and Tier 3 majors as safety; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 4286), you can focus on reaching for top majors like Clinical Medicine and Stomatology; if your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (around 5286), you should prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.
